title: Export board with images
excerpt:
When exporting a board to Excel: 
It would be nice to have images also exported. So we can use it as a list to our clients/customers. Or use this lists to check it the items/objects are present, with images this would be…

posts.author: Jappa (Jasper Schulten)
posts.cookedHtml:
When exporting a board to Excel:

It would be nice to have images also exported. So we can use it as a list to our clients/customers. Or use this lists to check it the items/objects are present, with images this would be much easier.

posts.author: chrisloop (Chris)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed here… frustrating that we can’t export our data with images somehow. Though I do understand that this is complicated to do in Excel.
